text.tspan: Data engineer with 6 years building
production data systems
- from ingesting market feeds for
3,000+ securities
to designing
credit scoring pipelines
from scratch as a startup's
first data hire
. M.Sc. in AI
(VU Amsterdam,
) and
Databricks Certified Data Engineer Professional

svg.text: Thesis: Uncertainty Quantification in Deep RL
Coursework: Data Mining (9.0), Deep Learning (9.5), Sequence Analysis (9.0)
Top university in China; strong quantitative and systems foundation.
GLP Technology, Shanghai - Lead Data Engineer

text.tspan: • Joined a lending fintech as its first technical hire; designed and built the complete
credit risk data platform from raw data ingestion through automated decisioning and
post-loan monitoring.
• Engineered the core decision engine: 29 rejection rules across 4 risk dimensions,
36-segment borrower classification, and a 19-feature early-delinquency scorecard for
first-payment default prediction.
• Built the data foundation powering all risk systems: daily ETL of 30+ production tables
into AWS Redshift plus a credit bureau parser transforming nested JSON into 5
structured analytical tables.
Technical Skills:
Python, PySpark, AWS (Redshift, S3), SQL, ETL, Credit Risk
• Built end-to-end market data ingestion pipeline processing 3,000+ A-share securities
and 5+ years of tick-level futures data; implemented corporate action handling and
deduplication for downstream research and live trading.
• Built systematic alpha research pipeline applying Fama-MacBeth regression to validate
4 factor families across 3,000+ securities; validated signals were integrated into the
fund's live portfolio.
Technical Skills:
Python, NumPy, Pandas, SQL, Factor Modeling, Backtesting
• Built anti-fraud detection system identifying 51,000+ suspicious order clusters across
2.2M+ users using 3 pattern algorithms, preventing fraudulent subsidy claims during
hyper-growth.
• Optimized 90+ Hadoop/Hive queries through partition pruning and subquery pushdown,
cutting scan volume 5x (500GB to 100GB) and unlocking real-time analytics across
30+ warehouse tables.
Technical Skills:
SQL, Hadoop, Hive, Python, Data Pipeline Optimization
• Built automated pipeline to ingest, validate, and consolidate non-standardized Excel
reports from 20+ business units into unified operational reporting, reducing monthly
processing from 2 days to under 2 hours.
Technical Skills:
Excel, VBA, Data Automation, SQL, Data Quality
• Built batch ETL pipeline ingesting 3,842 JSON sensor snapshots through Bronze/Silver/
Gold Medallion Architecture using PySpark and Delta Lake; designed an entity-
attribute-value model and SHA-256 hashing for idempotent reprocessing.
Technical Skills:
PySpark, Delta Lake, Medallion Architecture, Data Quality

svg.text: M.Sc. Thesis: UQ in Deep RL

text.tspan: • Developed benchmarking framework evaluating 5 uncertainty quantification methods
across 150+ HPC runs; demonstrated QR-DQN superiority with 31% lower CRPS
(p < 0.001) over ensemble and dropout baselines.
Technical Skills:
PyTorch, Deep RL, Statistical Testing, HPC/SLURM
Languages & Core:
Python (Expert), SQL (Expert), Bash
Data Engineering:
PySpark, Spark, Delta Lake, Databricks, ETL/ELT,
Cloud & DevOps:
AWS, Docker, Airflow, CI/CD, Git
Databases:
PostgreSQL, MySQL, Hadoop, Hive
ML/AI:
Pandas, NumPy, PyTorch, XGBoost, LightGBM, scikit-learn
Production data platforms, data quality, and end-to-end system ownership.
Strong fit for Data Engineer and platform-oriented ML infrastructure roles.
